india_trends.title: Holding 10 or more mutual funds? You may be over-diversified — here’s the ideal number
india_trends.summary: While there is no magical number, most wealth advisors and financial planners that Mint talked to recommended that 4-6 funds spread across asset classes and stock categories can take care of the majority of the needs of an investor.

india_trends.title: Tata Communications Q4 Results: Net profit drops 65% YoY to ₹263 crore; firm announces ₹17.5 final dividend
india_trends.summary: For the March quarter, Tata Communications posted a net profit of ₹263 crore, a 65% decrease from last year. Revenue rose 9.4% to ₹6,554 crore, bolstered by Data Services growth. A final dividend of ₹17.50 per share was also declared.

india_trends.title: Condoms to turn costly: Durex supplier Karex set to hike prices by up to 30% as Iran war hits supply chain
india_trends.summary: The world’s leading condom manufacturer&nbsp;relies on a range of petrochemical-linked materials — such as ammonia used to preserve latex, ethanol for packaging and printing, and silicone oil to lubricate each condom.

india_trends.title: Sunteck Realty Q4 profit rises 27% to Rs 64 crore
india_trends.summary: Sunteck Realty Ltd on Tuesday reported a 27 per cent increase in consolidated net profit to Rs 63.75 crore in the March quarter of the last fiscal year.

india_trends.title: Refurbished electronics firm Grest secures strategic FDI from Japan’s ICMG
india_trends.summary: Grest, a refurbished electronics company, has received investment from Japan's ICMG. This marks a significant early-stage cross-border investment in India's recommerce market. Global interest in India's refurbished electronics sector is rising. Industry reports show strong growth projections for use

india_trends.title: Sattva Group, Knowledge Realty Trust to build waste management system along Karnataka 320km-coastline
india_trends.summary: Bengaluru-based realty firm Sattva Group has partnered with Knowledge Realty Trust and rePurpose Global to address the challenge of plastic waste along Karnataka's 320 km coastline.

Infosys Q4 results preview: Profit may dip QoQ; all eyes on guidance, deal wins
india_trends.summary: Infosys will announce its Q4FY26 results on April 23, with investors focused on earnings and growth outlook amid geopolitical risks and generative AI impacts. Profit is estimated at ₹7,508.6 crore, a 4% YoY increase, while revenue may grow 13.7% YoY to ₹46,567 crore.

india_trends.title: Adani Green among 9 largecap stocks that hit 52-week high; rally up to 40% in a month
india_trends.summary: Despite Sensex falling sharply, several large-cap stocks hit 52-week highs, signalling strong momentum. Gains in power, energy, and industrial stocks highlight resilience and potential continued upside amid broader market weakness.

india_trends.title: Tata Power sets board meeting date to declare Q4 results 2026. Details here
india_trends.summary: Tata Power Q4 update: The Tata group company has fixed 12 May 2026 as the board meeting date to consider Q4 results and dividend. Brokerages expect a double-digit fall in profit and sales for January-March quarter.

india_trends.summary: India's alcoholic beverage industry is grappling with profit pressures this financial year. india_trends.summary: The Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade is ensuring continuous supply of fuel, gas, and essential raw materials. india_trends.title: Trent Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 26% YoY to Rs 400 crore; Rs 6/share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Trent Q4 Results: Revenue from operations in Q4 stood at Rs 5,028 crore, up 19% compared to Rs 4,216 crore in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year.

world_trends.title: Why Strategy’s stock is outperforming bitcoin these days
world_trends.summary: Strategy’s stock shows extreme sensitivity when bitcoin is trading around the average price of its cryptocurrency holding. Profitability is binary

world_trends.title: Emerging-market stocks are back on top in April after punishing Iran selloff. Why they can keep on climbing.
world_trends.summary: A popular exchange-traded fund that tracks stocks in emerging markets has surged in April — but the ETF is still trailing the S&P 500 since the start of the Iran conflict.

world_trends.title: Investors rediscover a taste for extremely speculative stocks as market rips higher in April
world_trends.summary: “Magnificent Seven” tech stocks are finally riding high once again in April after a months-long bout of underperformance. Yet the real winners of the April stock-market rebound — at least, so far — are in the smaller, and far more speculative camp.
